leadText: Shadow Break (Japanese: ダークブレイク Dark Break) is one of several Shadow moves available only in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness. Like other Shadow Moves, it is forgotten and replaced with another move once the Pokémon is purified.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Shadow Break inflicts damage and has no secondary effect. As Shadow Pokémon cannot be traded, and since Pokémon Contests do not exist in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness, Shadow Break cannot be used in Contests.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description XD A shattering ram attack with a shadowy aura.
